summary: VIP Section Redesign and Academy Functionality Testing Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: VIP Landing page and VIP Hub load correctly with modern design. Academy tab displays 5 courses with progress tracking. Course Detail Modal and Module Content Modal work correctly with 'Marquer comme terminé' (Mark as Complete) button functional.

issues: Console warning: 'turtle' is not a valid icon name for family 'ionicons' - should use valid ionicon name

action_items: Minor: Fix invalid icon name 'turtle' in VIP Hub Tools tab (use a valid ionicons icon like 'time' or 'hourglass')
critical_code_review_comments: VIP Landing Page (/vip) loads with modern design - hero section, diamond icon, price card ($6.99), features list, testimonials, FAQ
VIP Hub (/vip/hub) loads with dark glassmorphism design and 8 tab navigation
Academy tab displays all 5 courses from GET /api/vip/academy with proper progress percentages
Course Detail Modal opens when clicking on course cards - shows all 12 modules for 'Analyse Technique Avancée'
Clicking 'Continuer le cours' opens first incomplete module (correctly calculates which module to open based on progress)
Module Content Modal displays module title, duration (40 min), and full content text
'Marquer comme terminé' button is visible and triggers POST /api/vip/academy/{course_id}/progress API
Progress updates correctly reflected in course list after completing module
VIP status banner appears for VIP users showing 'Espace VIP' with 'Actif' badge on homepage

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All VIP pages load correctly, Academy functionality works

seed_data_creation: Course progress created during testing: course-1 at 25%, course-2 at 50%, course-3 at 7%, course-4 at 100%
context_for_next_testing_agent: VIP redesign complete. VIP Landing page has new modern dark design with diamond hero, price card, features, testimonials and FAQ. VIP Hub has 8 tabs: Outils, Alertes, Portfolio, Catalogue, Académie, Social, Récompenses, IA Mentor. Academy tab shows 5 courses with module_content arrays. Course Detail Modal shows all modules with progress checkmarks. Module Content Modal shows module text and 'Marquer comme terminé' button that calls POST /api/vip/academy/{course_id}/progress with calculated progress_percent.

tests_performed.test: Backend: Admin VIP login
Backend: VIP user login (jcuradeau.7@gmail.com)
Backend: Academy requires auth (returns 401/403)
Backend: GET /api/vip/academy returns 5 courses
Backend: Each course has module_content array with id, title, duration, content
Backend: Courses have multiple difficulty levels (avancé, expert, intermédiaire)
Backend: Progress endpoint requires auth
Backend: POST /api/vip/academy/{course_id}/progress updates progress
Backend: Progress persists in course list
Backend: 100% progress marks course as completed
Backend: Module-by-module progress calculation works
Backend: GET /api/vip/features returns 8 features and price
Backend: GET /api/vip/status returns VIP status
Backend: All VIP Hub tab endpoints work (tools, alerts, wallet, achievements, social)
Frontend: VIP Landing Page loads with hero, price card, features
Frontend: VIP Hub loads with 8 tab navigation
Frontend: Academy tab shows 5 courses with progress bars
Frontend: Course Detail Modal opens with module list
Frontend: 'Continuer le cours' opens correct module
Frontend: Module Content Modal shows title, duration, content
Frontend: 'Marquer comme terminé' button visible
